title: Ethiopian-Style Stew with Mellow Flavors
description: A mild and aromatic stew made with a blend of spices and tender vegetables. This dish is a delicious take on traditional Ethiopian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Ethiopian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ye and alicha and stir to combine.
Add the can of tomatoes and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
